**What does this change and why?**

**Tested on** (platform + how — see CONTRIBUTING.md; "units only" is fine for
logic changes):

- [ ] `tests/test_pipeline.py` units pass
- [ ] Tested live on: <!-- e.g. macOS M2, Ubuntu 24.04 X11, "not tested live" -->

**Checklist**

- [ ] No new runtime network requests (everything stays local)
- [ ] No new pip dependencies (or the PR explains why one is needed)
- [ ] UI change? Screenshot attached
